name: Aphra (how nonchalant!)
description:
The Nonchalant Furry got a lil revamp since idk i just wanted to, it shouldn’t be as bad or scuffed as it was before so please checkout the bot! I need OPINIONS!

The intro got updated, i didnt like it myself.. wtf. SERIOUSLY i fixed it this time! Intro mad shorter. It was like 800 smth…. (Old message of Aphra)

Soo when I unprivate this bot, i think it’s goin up to the first row of my bots😭 (thankfully it didnt) but i didnt want anyone seeing me fixing it while they chat with it or smth (im stupid for even thinking this cuz who tf would even chat with it?)

do what you want with em, he won’t really care obviously. There is no smothering or anything, you can just ask for em to do it.

(Might have made the bot worse😁)

Pics by Mermio/LamentLife
creator: nixtrq
